title: Bliss SMP plugin (BlissGems)
description: BlissGems is a Minecraft plugin that adds a unique gem system where players equip magical gems in their offhand to gain passive abilities and activate powerful skills. There are 8 of the gem types (Astra, Fire, Flux, Life, Puff, Speed, Strength, Wealth)
body:
![BlissSMP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a70e5f14fa6fbf15fd6d980e9561f6fa067a0640.png)

# Preview
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/xGakMHUgMHo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# About:

A powerful Minecraft plugin that adds 8 unique custom gems with abilities, passives, and a dynamic energy system. Each gem features 2 upgrade tiers and comes with a custom resource pack for beautiful textures!

---

  BlissGems is a comprehensive gem-based ability system for Minecraft Paper/Purpur 1.21+ servers. Players equip powerful gems in their offhand for
  passive effects and use them in their main hand to unleash devastating abilities.
